use_cases: Dark mode toggle for applications requiring light/dark theme switching
Feature flag controls to enable/disable product features dynamically
Settings panels for toggling boolean configuration options
Permission controls for enabling/disabling user capabilities
ai_summary: A cinematic dark-themed toggle switch component featuring emerald accent colors and spring-based animations. The switch uses Framer Motion for smooth thumb movement with tactile scale feedback on tap, set against a glass-morphism styled container with backdrop blur effects. Designed for settings interfaces, dark mode toggles, and feature flag controls in modern SaaS applications.
